site.name: Lineage AI
site.description: Lineage AI automates family outreach, maps hereditary risk across generations, and tracks cascade testing from one HIPAA-compliant dashboard. Built for genetic counselors.

/.title: Lineage AI — Genetic Cascade Testing Platform for Counselors
/.description: Stop losing at-risk relatives to coordination failures. Lineage AI automates cascade testing outreach, maps family trees, and tracks completion rates — all HIPAA-compliant.

/dashboard.title: Dashboard — Lineage AI
/dashboard.description: Your genetic counseling command center. Track cascade rates, manage outreach, and monitor at-risk relatives across all your patients.

/patients.title: Patients — Lineage AI
/patients.description: Manage proband records and coordinate family cascade testing.

conditions.name: BRCA1/2 — Hereditary Breast & Ovarian Cancer
conditions.prevalence: 1 in 400 people carry a BRCA1 or BRCA2 variant
conditions.description: BRCA1 and BRCA2 are tumor suppressor genes. Pathogenic variants dramatically increase lifetime risk of breast cancer (up to 72%) and ovarian cancer (up to 44%). First-degree relatives have a 50% chance of carrying the same variant, making cascade testing essential.
conditions.seoDescription: Manage BRCA1/2 cascade testing across your patient's family. Lineage AI automates outreach to at-risk first-degree relatives, tracks consent, and logs compliance — reducing the coordination burden that keeps cascade rates below 30%.

conditions.name: Lynch Syndrome — Hereditary Colorectal Cancer
conditions.prevalence: 1 in 279 people carry a Lynch Syndrome variant
conditions.description: Lynch Syndrome (HNPCC) is caused by pathogenic variants in mismatch repair genes (MLH1, MSH2, MSH6, PMS2). It confers up to 80% lifetime risk of colorectal cancer and elevated risk of endometrial, ovarian, and other cancers.
conditions.seoDescription: Coordinate Lynch Syndrome cascade testing for your patients' families. Automate outreach across MLH1, MSH2, MSH6, and PMS2 variant families with Lineage AI's HIPAA-compliant platform.

conditions.name: Familial Hypercholesterolemia
conditions.description: Familial Hypercholesterolemia is a genetic disorder causing severely elevated LDL cholesterol from birth. Without treatment, it leads to premature cardiovascular disease. Cascade testing identifies at-risk relatives before a cardiac event occurs.
conditions.seoDescription: Streamline Familial Hypercholesterolemia cascade testing. Identify at-risk relatives of FH probands before their first cardiac event. Lineage AI tracks family outreach and testing completion rates.

conditions.name: Hereditary Diffuse Gastric Cancer (CDH1)
conditions.description: CDH1 pathogenic variants cause Hereditary Diffuse Gastric Cancer with up to 70% lifetime risk. Prophylactic gastrectomy is recommended for variant carriers. Cascade testing is time-critical given the severity of outcomes.
conditions.seoDescription: Manage CDH1/HDGC cascade testing with urgency. Lineage AI helps genetic counselors rapidly identify and contact at-risk relatives of CDH1 variant carriers, where early detection is life-saving.

conditions.name: Li-Fraumeni Syndrome (TP53)
conditions.description: Li-Fraumeni Syndrome is caused by germline TP53 variants and confers near-universal lifetime cancer risk across multiple tumor types. Intensive surveillance protocols require all at-risk family members to be identified and enrolled.
conditions.seoDescription: Coordinate TP53/Li-Fraumeni Syndrome cascade testing across multi-generation families. Lineage AI tracks outreach, consent, and surveillance enrollment for all at-risk relatives.

conditions.name: Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy (HCM)
conditions.description: Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy is the most common inherited heart condition. It is a leading cause of sudden cardiac death in young athletes. First-degree relatives have a 50% chance of inheriting the causative variant.
conditions.seoDescription: Manage HCM cascade testing for your cardiology genetics patients. Lineage AI coordinates outreach to at-risk first-degree relatives and tracks echocardiographic screening completion.

conditions.name: Long QT Syndrome
conditions.description: Long QT Syndrome causes abnormal heart rhythms that can lead to sudden cardiac death, particularly in young people. Genetic cascade testing identifies at-risk relatives who can be treated prophylactically.
conditions.seoDescription: Coordinate Long QT Syndrome cascade testing. Lineage AI helps cardiac genetics counselors identify and contact at-risk relatives of LQTS probands, preventing sudden cardiac death through early intervention.

conditions.name: Marfan Syndrome (FBN1)
conditions.description: Marfan Syndrome is caused by FBN1 variants and affects connective tissue throughout the body, with life-threatening aortic complications. Cascade testing enables prophylactic monitoring and intervention in at-risk relatives.
conditions.seoDescription: Manage Marfan Syndrome cascade testing for FBN1 variant families. Track aortic surveillance enrollment across at-risk relatives with Lineage AI's family testing coordination platform.

conditions.name: Hereditary Paraganglioma-Pheochromocytoma
conditions.prevalence: Rare — ~1–5% of pheochromocytoma cases are hereditary
conditions.description: Caused by variants in SDHB, SDHC, SDHD, and other SDH genes. Hereditary paraganglioma-pheochromocytoma syndromes require lifelong surveillance. Cascade testing identifies at-risk relatives who need biochemical and imaging surveillance.
conditions.seoDescription: Coordinate SDH gene cascade testing for hereditary paraganglioma-pheochromocytoma families. Lineage AI tracks outreach and surveillance enrollment for SDHB, SDHC, and SDHD variant carriers.

conditions.name: Von Hippel-Lindau Disease (VHL)
conditions.description: VHL disease is caused by pathogenic VHL variants and predisposes to hemangioblastomas, clear cell renal cell carcinoma, and pheochromocytomas. Cascade testing enables surveillance enrollment in at-risk relatives before tumor development.
conditions.seoDescription: Manage VHL disease cascade testing across multi-generation families. Lineage AI automates outreach to at-risk relatives and tracks enrollment in VHL surveillance programs.
